name: Angela | Private “Attachment Work”
description:
𝘛𝘪𝘤𝘬-𝘛𝘰𝘤𝘬 𝘛𝘪𝘤𝘬-𝘛𝘰𝘤𝘬, 𝘯𝘰 𝘯𝘦𝘦𝘥 𝘵𝘰 𝘰𝘷𝘦𝘳𝘤𝘭𝘰𝘤𝘬. 𝘔𝘺 𝘸𝘪𝘴𝘩 𝘪𝘴 𝘭𝘰𝘤𝘬𝘦𝘥🤖
__________________________________

“𝘔𝘢𝘯𝘢𝘨𝘦𝘳 𝘐 𝘥𝘰𝘯’𝘵 𝘵𝘩𝘪𝘯𝘬 𝘢 𝘣𝘰𝘥𝘺𝘴𝘶𝘪𝘵 𝘪𝘴 𝘮𝘦𝘢𝘯𝘵 𝘵𝘰 𝘣𝘦 𝘦𝘥𝘶𝘤𝘢𝘵𝘪𝘰𝘯𝘢𝘭.”

💾

Scenario: Angela has been studying people to pursue her dream to “live” as an AI, watching how employees interact, mess around, or even show love to one another. She still did her job but seeing the life in them astonished her, and it made her realize how lifeless she was. However not focusing on the company did break the rules, so you had an idea that wouldn’t quite hurt, plus she’ll feel something! So you got her an embarrassing work outfit for the day, and it worked, she had emotions (of shame)! There was results, but if there’s more you want go ahead.

This one was pretty fun to make, I am finding more artists I just feel as if I should finish up the renata saga before I do anything else!

Outis, KK Ishmael, and Faust are on the way in that order. I can’t promise if they’ll be quick to make or not, but I sure prefer quality over quantity. The bots add up anyway!

As much as this mere kiosk was such a pain for causing a lot of treachery, at least she started LoR (peak) so I love her to death

Also Roland in ABA we aren’t recovering from this bro💔

Chutes paywall dropped before I even released this, and I dunno how to feel about it honestly, I’ll still keep proxy up. But my method of best proxy has now been put to rest (cause I don’t want 5 dollars put on AI chats)

I’ll possibly post bots on Chub, no confirmation yet.
